seoTitle: Fairy Hill vs Fairy Meadow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fairy Hill and Fairy Meadow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fairy Hill vs Fairy Meadow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fairy Hill and Fairy Meadow.
heading: Fairy Hill vs Fairy Meadow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fairy Hill, New South Wales and Fairy Meadow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fairy Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Fairy Meadow (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fairy Hill or Fairy Meadow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fairy Hill has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Fairy Meadow scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fairy Hill scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Fairy Meadow scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fairy Hill or Fairy Meadow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fairy Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
